coupon.source_phrase_block: Fall-Spring (Septemper 2, 2025 through May 22, 2026): Pass admits up to 4 people at 50% off the cost of admission. Summer (May 26, 2026 through September 4, 2026, weekdays only): Pass admits up to four people (adult, senior, child, or college) at a cost of $20 each. Children under age 3 are not included in the admission count and are always admitted free. This is a coupon pass that will be emailed and can be printed or displayed on your mobile screen.
